---
title: "Welcome To My Blog"
author: "Anjani Nadan"
date: "2026-05-09"
categories: [gsoc]
---

This is the first post in a Quarto blog. Welcome!

![](gsoc selection.png)

I am very thankful to my mentors, Toby and Sebastian, for giving me the opportunity to contribute to the R project for statistical computing.
As my mentors are my teachers, they inspire me to continuously improve my skills through their guidance and support. By the end of this journey, I hope to contribute a well-designed and optimized package to the project.
